originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__xGridSpacing_2` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&xGridSpacing` is never used.
reasoning: e30bfedce4d.c L24: 'int xGridSpacing = left_probe_bed_position;' — xGridSpacing is assigned but never subsequently used in the simplified source. Genuine dead store. When ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING=T, AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID is also defined (L1-3: #define AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID inside #ifdef ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING), so L23-25 (#ifdef AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID block) is always taken. PC=ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING=T correctly captures the condition. No library macros. New bug, correctly constrained PC.
